MANAGE.CREATE_SUB: Fill in the details to create a new conference

ERRORS.TITLE_MIN: Conference name must be at least 3 characters long.

ABOUT.LEAD: At the end of October, dozens of academic conferences will be held across the country in a wide range of research fields, as part of an initiative to strengthen ties between Israeli researchers and research institutions, both in Israel and abroad.
ABOUT.CONTENT_1: The initiative, in collaboration with the Israel Young Academy, seeks to leverage the arrival of thousands of Israeli researchers from abroad to Israel during the Knesset election period to create professional meetings, encourage research collaborations, reveal new academic opportunities, and strengthen the international status of Israeli academia.
ABOUT.CONTENT_2: Mind-IL invites researchers and industry partners to take part in a celebration of scientific excellence, creativity, and international cooperation.
ABOUT.CONTENT_3: If you care about the future of science and research in Israel, join us.

COMMITTEE.TITLE: Steering Committee Members
MEMBERS: Ran I. Snitkovsky, Tel Aviv University
Adi Stern, Tel Aviv University, The Israel Young Academy

CONF_PAGE.CTA_SUB: Join us for a fascinating conference with the best experts in the field

EVENTS.TITLE: Scientific Conference Surveys for 2026
EVENTS.INTRO: For your convenience, we have compiled the preliminary surveys for conferences scheduled to take place around the elections. Join us in celebrating Israeli science!
